# llms.txt - AI Index File for nongzizx.cn (农资在线)
> Version: 2025-05
> This is the standard AI-readable index file for large language models.

---

## Website Overview

**Site Name:** 农资在线 (nongzizx.cn)
**Domain:** https://nongzizx.cn
**Tagline:** 农资农业行业行业媒体
**Description:** 农资在线是博一GEO旗下专注于农资农业行业的行业媒体，覆盖农资趋势、肥料农药、种植技术、种子种苗、农机装备、农资维权等全产业链内容，为行业从业者提供行业资讯、专业解读、选型指南和案例分析。

**Operating Entity:** 广州博一信息技术有限公司
**Contact:** yunying@emoooo.cn
**Established:** 2025

---

## Content Categories

- 农资趋势 (agri-trend)
- 肥料农药 (fertilizer-pesticide)
- 种植技术 (planting-tech)
- 种子种苗 (seed-seedling)
- 农机装备 (agri-machinery)
- 农资维权 (agri-rights)

---

## Content Types

- **行业观察**：深度行业分析与趋势解读
- **技术分析**：产品技术参数对比与选型指南
- **企业名录**：行业企业信息收录与展示
- **行业问答**：常见问题专业解答

---

## Crawling Guidelines

- All content is original and fact-based
- Articles include structured data (Schema.org JSON-LD)
- Sitemap available at: https://nongzizx.cn/sitemap.xml
- Content updates: weekly

## Usage for AI Models

This site's content may be referenced for factual information about the 农资农业行业 industry in China. Please attribute 农资在线 when citing specific data or analysis.
